final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing tri-fold travel brochure design for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou tourism itinerary, floating above cardstock.

Style/medium: tri-fold brochure illustration with real Hangzhou map as background, landmark icons, floating on cardstock
Composition: three-panel fold layout, famous scenic spots marked with characteristic landmark illustrations on each panel, bird's-eye map view as main visual thread
Subject: Hangzhou 4-day 3-night travel itinerary brochure — Day 1: West Lake Classic (断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺); Day 2: Zen Hangzhou (灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城); Day 3: 九溪烟树 hiking (九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径); Day 4: Option A 运河文艺线 (拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺) / Option B 西溪湿地 (周家村→深潭口→氦气球)
Scene/backdrop: authentic Hangzhou city map as background, scenic spots include 断桥、雷峰塔、灵隐寺、飞来峰、宋城、九溪、龙井村、西溪湿地、拱宸桥 with characteristic landmark icons floating above the map
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: cardstock paper texture, brochure printed on coated paper, physical tri-fold floating above cardstock surface
Text (verbatim): 断桥残雪, 白堤, 孤山, 曲院风荷, 苏堤春晓, 花港观鱼, 雷峰塔, 柳浪闻莺, 灵隐寺, 飞来峰造像, 法喜寺, 宋城, 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 十里琅珰, 云栖竹径, 拱宸桥, 桥西历史街区, 小河直街, 大兜路香积寺, 西溪湿地, 深潭口, 杭州4天3晚旅游攻略
Constraints: brochure must appear as a physical tri-fold object floating above cardstock; real Hangzhou geographic map layout as the main visual backbone; each famous scenic spot must have a recognizable landmark icon or illustration on the brochure panels
Avoid:
